{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-943", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements in Data Query Logic"}], "description": "## Finding

**Location**: `core/src/client/graphql.ts:66-80`

The `gql` template tag function warned about interpolated values containing GraphQL metacharacters (`{}():`) but still concatenated them into the query string, enabling potential GraphQL injection.

## Status

**Fixed in v0.2.136** — The `gql` function now throws an error when metacharacters are detected in interpolated values, forcing developers to use the `variables` parameter.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-5c7w-4wm3-85vw", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-02T19:00:12Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5c7w-4wm3-85vw", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-5c7w-4wm3-85vw"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-02T19:00:12Z", "references": ["https://github.com/asymmetric-effort/specifyjs/security/advisories/GHSA-5c7w-4wm3-85vw", "https://github.com/asymmetric-effort/specifyjs/commit/25d1fb491d99479efdf501f5f75e0bb80c908f0a", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5c7w-4wm3-85vw"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/asymmetric-effort/specifyjs/security-advisories/GHSA-5c7w-4wm3-85vw", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/asymmetric-effort/specifyjs", "summary": "@asymmetric-effort/specifyjs: GraphQL gql tag allows metacharacter injection", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-02T19:00:13Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-5c7w-4wm3-85vw", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.2.136", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@asymmetric-effort/specifyjs"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.2.136"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: @asymmetric-effort/specifyjs: GraphQL gql tag allows metacharacter injection
